text:
Plan Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether a dual eligible special needs plan (D-SNP) is an Applicable Integrated Plan (AIP). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes (D-SNP AIP plan) 
N = No (D-SNP is not an AIP plan) 
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2023. 

The Bipartisan Budget Act (BBA) of 2018 permanently authorized Medicare Advantage dual-eligible 
special needs plans (D-SNPs), strengthened Medicare-Medicaid integration requirements.
